label: UNFAIR ADVANTAGE
headline: Why our athletes consistently outperform their past selves.
feat1_title: Plans That Adapt When Life Happens
feat1_desc: Plans that adapt to your sleep score. If you slept 4 hours, we won't ask for a VO2 Max session.
feat2_desc: Every day starts with a readiness check. We adapt session intent based on fatigue, recovery, and recent load so you train hard on the right days.
feat3_desc: Track glycogen trends, see metabolic horizon risk, and get actionable fueling targets before and after key sessions.
